zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Greville於大約1494年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾傑爾特納姆時，她的父親William Greville31歲，母親Margery Arrell27歲。她於1511年與Sir Richard Lygon在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1542年在她的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾馬德雷斯費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Greville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Gréville (Manche), common in Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Greville was born about 1494, in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Greville, was 31 and her mother, Margery Arrell, was 27. She married Sir Richard Lygon in 1511, in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 8 daughters. She died in 1542, in her hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Greville est née environ 1494, à Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Greville, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margery Arrell, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Lygon en 1511, à Madresfield, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée en 1542, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterrée à Madresfield, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Greville um 1494 in Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Greville 31 und ihre Mutter Margery Arrell 27. Sie hat 1511 in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Lygon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb 1542 im Alter von 49 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Madresfield, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Greville è nata il circa 1494 nel Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Greville, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Margery Arrell, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Lygon nel 1511, nel Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1542, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolta a Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Grevilleが約1494年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアチェルテンハムで生まれた時，父William Grevilleは31歳，母Margery Arrellは27歳であった。1511年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマドレスフィールドでSir Richard Lygonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1542年に故郷で49歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアマドレスフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Greville(이)가 대략 1494년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 헬텐함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Greville(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Arrell(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1511년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 매드레스필드에서 Sir Richard Lygon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1542년 그녀의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 매드레스필드에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Lygon em 1511, em Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1542, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultada em Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Greville родилась около 1494 г. в местности челтенам, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Greville было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margery Arrell, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Lygon в 1511 г. в местности мадресфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Она умерла в 1542 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и была похоронена в местности мадресфиелд, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Greville nació aproximadamente 1494, en Cheltenham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Greville, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margery Arrell, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Lygon en 1511, en Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1542, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultada en Madresfield, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
